title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 547.320 - Cause remanded, procedure
text:
547.320.  Cause remanded, procedure. — The court to which any criminal cause shall be remanded for a new trial shall proceed therein in the same manner as if such cause had not been removed into the supreme court.
(RSMo 1939 § 4157) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3767; 1919 § 4113; 1909 § 5318
